code:
import io
import string

let prefix = match io.read_line()
when Some(p)
  p
when None
  ""
end

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
      print("YES")
    else
      print("NO")
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
